response.justification: Aisha is a technically capable generalist with 15+ years of software engineering experience across a wide range of stacks and domains, and shows some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure via MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands Director-level strategic influence, recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products at scale, and cloud platform depth — none of which are evidenced in this resume. The AI experience is shallow and very recent (~1 year), there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no indication of executive presence, strategic customer advisory work, or the kind of internal/external thought leadership the position requires.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum tenure bar
Founded and sustained GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production — demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative
Recent work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq shows genuine engagement with current AI tooling
concerns: AI expertise is limited to ~1 year of agentic tooling work with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or models built at scale — the core differentiator for this role is absent
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and no evidence of cloud platform architecture depth (AWS CDK usage at one employer is not sufficient for a cloud strategy principal)
No Director-level IC track record: no evidence of cross-org technical leadership, strategic customer advisory engagements, or external recognition in AI/ML communities
